mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FUND_PERF_HIST ( FUND_CD, BASE_DT, CLS_PRC, NAV, DATA_CRT_USR_ID, DATA_CHG_USR_ID, LAST_SRC_NM ) VALUES ( #{fundCd}, #{baseDt}, #{clsPrc}, #{nav}, 'BATCH', 'BATCH', 'KRX_OPEN_API' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CLS_PRC = VALUES(CLS_PRC), NAV = VALUES(NAV), DATA_CHG_USR_ID = 'BATCH', LAST_SRC_NM = 'KRX_OPEN_API'
mapper.update: UPDATE FUND_PERF_HIST A LEFT JOIN FUND_PERF_HIST M1 ON A.FUND_CD = M1.FUND_CD AND DATE_SUB(A.BASE_DT, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) = M1.BASE_DT LEFT JOIN FUND_PERF_HIST M3 ON A.FUND_CD = M3.FUND_CD AND DATE_SUB(A.BASE_DT, INTERVAL 3 MONTH) = M3.BASE_DT LEFT JOIN FUND_PERF_HIST M6 ON A.FUND_CD = M6.FUND_CD AND DATE_SUB(A.BASE_DT, INTERVAL 6 MONTH) = M6.BASE_DT LEFT JOIN FUND_PERF_HIST M12 ON A.FUND_CD = M12.FUND_CD AND DATE_SUB(A.BASE_DT, INTERVAL 12 MONTH) = M12.BASE_DT SET A.RTN_1M = CASE WHEN A.NAV IS NOT NULL AND M1.NAV IS NOT NULL AND M1.NAV != 0 THEN ROUND(((A.NAV / M1.NAV) - 1) * 100, 4) ELSE A.RTN_1M END, A.RTN_3M = CASE WHEN A.NAV IS NOT NULL AND M3.NAV IS NOT NULL AND M3.NAV != 0 THEN ROUND(((A.NAV / M3.NAV) - 1) * 100, 4) ELSE A.RTN_3M END, A.RTN_6M = CASE WHEN A.NAV IS NOT NULL AND M6.NAV IS NOT NULL AND M6.NAV != 0 THEN ROUND(((A.NAV / M6.NAV) - 1) * 100, 4) ELSE A.RTN_6M END, A.RTN_12M = CASE WHEN A.NAV IS NOT NULL AND M12.NAV IS NOT NULL AND M12.NAV != 0 THEN ROUND(((A.NAV / M12.NAV) - 1) * 100, 4) ELSE A.RTN_12M END WHERE A.BASE_DT BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{fromDt}, '%Y%m%d') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{toDt}, '%Y%m%d')
